In some situations, a negative claim payment amount may be present. For example: 

1. when a beneficiary is charged the full deductible during a short stay and the deductible exceeded 
the amount Medicare pays; or 

2. when a beneficiary is charged a coinsurance amount during a long stay and the coinsurance amount 
exceeds the amount Medicare pays (most prevalent situation involves psych
